title: Cocoyashi Celebrates Victory
description: On pages 14–17, cocoyashi celebrates victory focuses on Luffy, Nami, Arlong, Nojiko as luffy destroys Arlong Park and declares Nami his crewmate, ending Arlong’s rule over Cocoyashi.
scene: On pages 14–17, cocoyashi celebrates victory focuses on Luffy, Nami, Arlong, Nojiko as luffy destroys Arlong Park and declares Nami his crewmate, ending Arlong’s rule over Cocoyashi.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's finally done, belliemere.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It took over 8 years, but at long last,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Everyone is free again!

dialogue.speaker: Nojiko
dialogue.text: Hey, Gen, Nojiko!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Do you think that if Belliemere was alive,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That she'd stop me from becoming a pirate?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: How could she allow her precious daughter to become a p...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Nope, she wouldn't!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But if she did, would you do as you're told?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Nope!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Not at all!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: UgyAA AAAa!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He's screaming again.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Well, duh. The doctor said it'd normally take 2 whole years for him to fully recover.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: and yet he still insists on moving around. He's out of his mind.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You fool! How could you even think of trying to shodily patch up these serious wounds on your own!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Don't you have a doctor on your ship!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Oww...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: A doctor? That's a good idea.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But we'd need a musician first.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Why...?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Because pirates gotta sing, you know.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Ahahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What is it, Gen? You've been laughing hysterically for the past while now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hahaha, how could I not?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You two are, without a doubt,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Bellie- mere's dough-ters!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Marine Base (16th) Branch)

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Do you hear me!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Roger, this is marine HQ.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This is CPT. Nezumi of the Marine's 16" branch speaking! Marine Code #00733!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm calling about an urgent request!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I can hear you just fine even if you don't yell.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Listen up! There's a strawhat- wearing pirate by the name of "luffy!"

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Marine HQ's Dendermushi

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: He and his 4 crew- members,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: are hereby to be labellied as enemies of the govern-ment!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Luffy, you said...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Marine H2 (Intel Manage- Ment offices)

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Not only have they defeated the arlong pirates, but considering their violent nature,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Roger.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I formally request a bounty to be placed on their captain's head!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'm form- Arding you his picture as I speak!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Couldn't you have taken a more serious picture!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That was the only one we could get...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Once your reports have been confirmed, we shall ask authorization from the higher-ups.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Listen to me! This is an extremely heinous pirate! He is to be taken dead or alive!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I ask that you place a bounty on his head for all nations of the world!

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
